inputs.label: Large Pulley Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the larger pulley. Use pitch diameter if available.

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the larger pulley. Use pitch diameter if available.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Büyük kasnağın çapı. Mümkünse adım çapını kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchmesser der größeren Riemenscheibe. Wenn verfügbar, Teilkreisdurchmesser verwenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre de la grande poulie. Utiliser le diamètre primitif si disponible.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro de la polea más grande. Use el diámetro primitivo si está disponible.
Diámetro de la polea más pequeña.

inputs.label: Center Distance
inputs.businessContext: Distance between the centers of the two pulleys.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance between the centers of the two pulleys.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand zwischen den Mittelpunkten der beiden Riemenscheiben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance entre les centres des deux poulies.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia entre los centros de las dos poleas.

inputs.label: Belt Configuration
inputs.businessContext: 0 for open belt drive (pulleys rotate same direction), 1 for crossed belt drive (pulleys rotate opposite directions).

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 for open belt drive (pulleys rotate same direction), 1 for crossed belt drive (pulleys rotate opposite directions).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0 açık kayış tahriki (kasnaklar aynı yönde döner), 1 çapraz kayış tahriki (kasnaklar zıt yönde döner).
businessContext_i18n.de: 0 für offenen Riemenantrieb (Riemenscheiben drehen in gleiche Richtung), 1 für gekreuzten Riemenantrieb (Riemenscheiben drehen in entgegengesetzte Richtungen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 pour courroie ouverte (poulies tournant dans le même sens), 1 pour courroie croisée (poulies tournant en sens inverse).
businessContext_i18n.es: 0 para transmisión abierta (poleas giran en el mismo sentido), 1 para transmisión cruzada (poleas giran en sentidos opuestos).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
